tdb X56 phase 2

OBD Information

Protocol: ISO8
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 51
Func Name: Tableau de bord

    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "400100",
    "name": "Configuration langue",
    "deny_sds": [
